title: Fix audio playback for all sound effects

requirements.text: Fix the 'Dreamy.mp3' sound effect on the Lock Screen (password entry page) so it plays successfully when the correct passcode is entered. Ensure the audio file is correctly referenced, loaded, and triggered via user interaction to comply with browser autoplay policies.
acceptanceCriteria: Dreamy.mp3 plays audibly when the correct password is submitted on the Lock Screen
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Dreamy.mp3
Audio plays in production deployment, not just local dev

requirements.text: Fix the 'Hello.mp3' sound effect on the Chat page so it plays when the Chat section is opened or a message is sent. Ensure the audio file path is correct, the file exists in the public assets, and playback is triggered within a user interaction event handler to avoid autoplay restrictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Hello.mp3 plays audibly when entering or interacting with the Chat page
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Hello.mp3

requirements.text: Fix the 'Double Knock.mp3' global click/touch sound in useDoubleKnockSound.ts so it plays on every click or touch event across all pages. Ensure: (1) the MP3 file path resolves correctly in production (use a path relative to the public directory), (2) the Audio object is preloaded, (3) playback is properly triggered, and (4) the 120ms throttle is working without silently suppressing errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Double Knock.mp3 plays audibly on every click or tap anywhere in the app
No console errors related to audio loading or playback for Double Knock.mp3
Throttle of ~120ms between plays still applies

requirements.text: Audit all three audio file references (Dreamy.mp3, Hello.mp3, Double Knock.mp3) and confirm they are placed under frontend/public/ with correct filenames and extensions. Update all import/reference paths in the hooks and pages to use root-relative public asset paths (e.g. '/assets/audio/Dreamy.mp3') so they resolve correctly after the production build.
acceptanceCriteria: All three audio files exist under frontend/public/ (e.g. frontend/public/assets/audio/)
All hooks and pages reference audio files using root-relative paths that work in production
Network tab in browser DevTools shows 200 responses for all audio file requests

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change backend logic or data models
Preserve the existing 120ms throttle on the Double Knock global click sound
nonGoals: Adding new sound effects or music
Modifying game pages or other UI components unrelated to audio
